Lachoneus (1) Chief judge of the Nephites when the sign of the birth of Christ was given (3 Nephi 1:1,15). Lachoneus was a righteous man (3 Nephi 3:12) who ruled during a time of great wickedness (3 Nephi 2:3,10). Bands of Gadianton became so numerous and so bold that they threatened the existence of the Nephite and Lamanite societies (3 Nephi 2:12-13). Giddianhi, a leader of the Gadiantons,…

As was the case with the chief judge, the chief captain worked in conjunction with the high priest over the land. The phrase: “and the land which was between the land Zarahemla and the land Bountiful” was deleted from the 1837 to 1920 editions of the Book of Mormon. It was present in the Printer’s manuscript, and in the 1830 edition. It was restored in the 1981 edition. (Book of Mormon Critical Text. FARMS, 1987, 3:1000).
